context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the create-engine-installer instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill when the task is to design or review how a host app installs and configures a Rails engine — generating initializers, copying migrations, mounting routes, or exposing a single install command.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Core principle:** Setup must be explicit, repeatable, and safe to rerun. Never modify the host app at boot time.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: GENERATE:  Run the generator against a clean host app

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: VERIFY:    Check output files exist in the correct host paths

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: RERUN:     Run the generator a second time

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: DOCUMENT:  List what was generated vs. what the user must do manually

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Minimal rerun spec (must always pass):**
